notes: Declarative provenance for the v1 distill ribbon. Fit on the MPtrj-DFT home regime; demonstrably corrects energy_volume + relaxation_stability (atlas). reference_families is the oracle set the ribbon may apply to; a campaign whose reference_family is outside this set is refused a-priori (T3 negative transfer). calibration_band is the home-regime baseline-error envelope from the v1 atlas (used as the post-hoc drift/garbage guard). See docs/regime_gate_dominance.md.
